name: chart-pie-legend
visual_summary: The chart-pie-legend is a graphical component used to display a legend for pie charts, typically used when a chart has multiple data series to distinguish between them. It is commonly used in data visualization and analytics applications. It provides a concise way to convey complex data insights by highlighting the meaning behind the colors used in the chart.
